channel.title: Darklane Theme Demo
channel.description: Recent content on Darklane Theme Demo

item.title: About
item.description: This is a demonstration site for the Darklane Hugo theme. Darklane is a clean, dark-themed blog template designed for technical writing and documentation. Theme Features Dark color scheme - Easy on the eyes with carefully chosen colors Syntax highlighting - Beautiful code blocks with multiple language support Custom shortcodes - Alerts, highlights, collapsible sections, tabs, and more LaTeX support - Write mathematical expressions inline or as display equations Responsive design - Works great on desktop and mobile CSS variables - Easy color customization through a single configuration Getting Started To use this theme for your own site, visit the GitHub repository for installation instructions and documentation.

item.title: Shortcode Gallery
item.description: Darklane includes several custom shortcodes to enhance your content beyond standard Markdown.

item.title: Markdown Guide
item.description: This post demonstrates the standard Markdown formatting features supported by Darklane.

item.title: Welcome to Darklane
item.description: Welcome to the Darklane theme demo! This is a simple example post to showcase the basic layout and styling.
